rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. DAMIAN OCHOA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Damian Ochoa To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories Unlawful Detainer And Monetary Sanction Request Against Defendant Damian Ochoa In The Amount Of $2760
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 6, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion To Compel Further Responses By Defendant Damian Ochoa To Plaintiff'S First Set Of Form Interrogatories Unlawful Detainer And Monetary Sanction Request Against Defendant Damian Ochoa In The Amount Of $2760 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete verified responses without objections shall be delivered to Plaintiff's counsel no later than September 11, 2017. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,060.= (501/REQ)
